"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/codex/proofs','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

# Reconfirm current lint facts after BEM-759 and create fresh Codex completion for downstream workflows.
def load(path):
    p=Path(path)
    if not p.exists(): return {}
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore'))
    except: return {}
b759=load('governance/state/bem759_diagnose_current_lint_gate_failure.json')
state={'schema_version':'fresh_tick_after_lint_no_new_violations.v1','bem':'BEM-760','status':'fresh_tick_after_current_lint_clean','bem759_status':b759.get('status'),'bem759_new_violations':b759.get('current_new_violation_count'),'expected':'workflow-lint-gate should not fail on current repository state; older failed BEM-753 run remains historical evidence only','blocker':None,'created_at':created}
state_file=Path('governance/state/bem760_fresh_tick_after_lint_no_new_violations.json')
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=Path('governance/reports/bem760_fresh_tick_after_lint_no_new_violations.md')
report.write_text('# BEM-760 | Fresh Tick After Lint No New Violations | PASS'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'BEM-759 status: '+str(b759.get('status'))+sep+'BEM-759 new violations: '+str(b759.get('current_new_violation_count'))+sep+'Blocker: null'+sep)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem760_fresh_tick_after_lint_no_new_violations','status':'fresh_tick_after_current_lint_clean','bem759_status':b759.get('status'),'bem759_new_violations':b759.get('current_new_violation_count'),'blocker':None,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem760_fresh_tick_after_lint_no_new_violations.txt')
proof.write_text('BEM-760 PASS fresh tick after current lint clean.\n')
